title: andropogon contortus var. allionii
intro: Andropogon contortus var. allionii, also known as Black-Sage or Black Sagebrush, is a plant species that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, sore throats, and respiratory infections, and is also believed to have health benefits such as reducing stress and promoting relaxation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as an infusion, tincture, or dried herb, and is also used in traditional medicine to make teas, salves, and ointments.
